name: microflex-crm
description: Microflex CRM — wired to MFX-OS Firebase project mfx-2026

scripts.build: npm run build:functions && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/web run lint && npm --prefix functions run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && npm --prefix functions run typecheck
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:web && firebase deploy --only hosting:crm
